## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling

## Validator Output

Paste the output of:

```bash
bash scripts/validate-skills.sh
```

## Sample Interaction Transcript

Required for new skills. Optional for focused edits and docs-only changes.

Paste a short prompt and response excerpt showing how the skill activates and what behavior changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/validate-skills.sh`.
- [ ] Every new or changed skill description includes `Use when`.
- [ ] Every new or changed `SKILL.md` body is 500 lines or fewer.
- [ ] I did not duplicate Meta docs; I linked authoritative sources instead.
- [ ] I updated relevant files under `references/` when skill guidance depends on shared detail.
- [ ] I referenced other skills by name, such as `sent-skills:waba-template-author`, not by local file path.
